creator: philippe.michel7@free.fr
text:
Using software linked with libGLU can lead to debug messages like :

arc_ccw_turn, p = 0
case a
arc_ccw_turn, p = 0
case c
arc_ccw_turn, p = 0
case b
arc_ccw_turn, p = 0
case d
arc_ccw_turn, p = 0
case a

in the terminal where it is launched.

The issue apparently has been fixed upstream (in the 2013-02-22 commit there : https://cgit.freedesktop.org/mesa/glu/log/ ) but this is not included in the tarfile used by the port.
